raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "AB 439 would include death certificates among the official documents with nonbinary options for gender identity.",
    "California is leading the nation in inclusive recognition of gender identities.",
    "Adding nonbinary as a gender option ensures nonbinary individuals' right to equal treatment under the law.",
    "Historically, U.S. law has not recognized the many ways people experience gender, causing serious pain and marginalization for nonbinary communities.",
    "Incorrectly assigning deceased nonbinary individuals a gender is disrespectful to their memories.",
